title: Senior Software Engineer - DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Chennai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions:
DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions!
